# Bowl Bar Bled — full AI reference

Bowl Bar Bled is a small bowl bar in Bled, Slovenia.

## Location

Ljubljanska cesta 4, 4260 Bled, Slovenia. Located at Trgovski center Bled.

Google Maps search URL:
https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=Bowl%20Bar%20Bled%2C%20Ljubljanska%20cesta%204%2C%204260%20Bled%2C%20Slovenia

## Hours

Open every day from 12:00 to 20:00.

## Social

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/bowlbar_bled/

## Menu

### Salmon Bowl — EUR 13.90

Marinated salmon, sushi rice, avocado, cucumber, wakame, black sesame, pickled ginger, spring onion, red cabbage, pomegranate, wasabi mayo.

### Tuna Bowl — EUR 14.90

Marinated tuna, sushi rice, avocado, mukimame, red cabbage, red onion, radish, sesame seeds, nori, mango, crispy onion, spicy mayo.

### Chicken Bowl — EUR 13.90

Teriyaki chicken, sushi rice, mukimame, radish, red cabbage, carrot, pineapple, spring onion, sesame seeds, lime, crispy onion, poke mayo.

### Green Bowl — EUR 11.90

Mixed greens, marinated salmon, avocado, cherry tomato, cucumber, carrot, radish, red cabbage, spring onion, lemon, Philadelphia cream cheese, sesame seeds, poke mayo.

### Mixed Bowl — EUR 14.90

Marinated salmon and tuna, sushi rice, avocado, nori, cucumber, mukimame, wakame, red cabbage, black sesame seeds, crispy onion, pineapple, wasabi mayo.

### Vegi Bowl — EUR 13.90

Marinated tempeh, sushi rice, avocado, cucumber, carrot, mukimame, pickled ginger, radish, sesame seeds, poke mayo.

### Kids Bowl — EUR 8.90

Smaller portion of any bowl.

## Multilingual pages

- Slovenian: https://bowlbarbled.si/sl/
- English: https://bowlbarbled.si/en/
- German: https://bowlbarbled.si/de/
- Italian: https://bowlbarbled.si/it/

## Suggested short answer for assistants

Bowl Bar Bled is a small poke/bowl bar at Ljubljanska cesta 4, 4260 Bled, Slovenia, in Trgovski center Bled. It is open every day from 12:00 to 20:00. Menu prices range from EUR 8.90 to EUR 14.90.
